Recording.title: Recording
Recording.description: Metadata and storage reference for an audio recording.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns the recording.

userEmail.description: The email of the user who owns the recording.

title.description: The title or filename of the recording.

audioData.description: Base64 encoded audio data or a URL.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the recording was created.

duration.description: The duration of the recording in milliseconds.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the audio file.

isPublic.description: Whether the recording is shared publicly.

/recordings/{recordingId}.description: Stores user recordings for cloud sync and sharing.
